description: A background painting has been prepared for the 'dwanko_run' scene. Composite the background image from '/home/ga/OpenToonz/assets/background_sky.png' behind the character animation in the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. Ensure the background is exposed for the duration of the animation (at least 10 frames) so the character renders in front of the sky-to-grass gradient. Render the final composite as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/composite/'.
